runTitle: Cloud Run 94ce8471b production targeted QA - AI routing closure check
coveredSurfaces: Vercel UI production AI sidebar direct-message flow for three post-deploy routing prompts
Cloud Run AI Engine /health returned status=ok, service=ai-engine, version=8.12.17
Vercel /api/version still reported frontend v8.12.17 commit b2f6ccf11a86076e96bca4e5a7daba0b4e4a4f70 and pipeline 2548270166 during this backend-targeted QA
AI Chat: lowest-load query returned a grounded monitoring-metric-ranking answer for web-nginx-dc1-03
AI Chat: Advisor performance improvement query returned non-empty Type C guidance for api-was-dc1-01
AI Chat: normal-range server list query failed semantic target by returning monitoring-server-health summary instead of inverse filter server list
skippedSurfaces: Standard five-question conversational QA: skipped to avoid extra live LLM calls; this run was a targeted rerun of the three user-requested post-deploy prompts.
Vision real-image QA: skipped per manual-only policy because Vision routing/provider behavior was not changed.
Broad route/dashboard/modal packs: skipped because this run validated Cloud Run AI routing behavior only.
Local ahead commits a4f1fc3b8/a2644ab32/251cdf0ab are test/docs/tooling only and were not part of the deployed production target.

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI Chat Advisor performance improvement guidance

expertAssessments.rationale: Two of three targeted production prompts passed, but the normal-range server list still failed the semantic target by routing to health summary instead of deterministic inverse filter evidence.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Deploy the local regex/pre-filter fix and rerun only the normal-range server list prompt.

expertAssessments.rationale: Cloud Run health and Vercel usage were normal, but Vercel /api/version still reported the previous frontend commit/pipeline while the QA target was the user-reported Cloud Run 94ce8471b revision.
expertAssessments.nextAction: After the next deploy, verify frontend version metadata and Cloud Run revision evidence point to the expected release surfaces.

expertAssessments.rationale: Playwright CLI exercised the three production UI prompts, and the local follow-up fix added regression coverage for the exact failed wording.

usageChecks.summary: npm run check:usage:vercel PASS. Current billing period effective 15.3081 USD, billed 0.0000 USD; no unexpected billed usage observed.

artifacts.label: Targeted AI routing prompt evidence
artifacts.note: Prompt results, semantic QA judgment, deploy/version observations, and local follow-up validation.

completedImprovements.title: Lowest-load and available-server TOP-N queries should use grounded ranking
completedImprovements.evidence: Production targeted QA on the user-reported 94ce8471b Cloud Run deployment asked '지금 부하가 가장 낮은 서버는?' and received web-nginx-dc1-03 via monitoring-metric-ranking.

completedImprovements.title: Advisor performance-improvement query should route to Advisor and return non-empty guidance
completedImprovements.evidence: Production targeted QA asked 'api-was-dc1-01 서버 성능 개선 조언 해줘' and received non-empty Type C guidance instead of the previous empty response.

pendingImprovements.title: Healthy-only server filter should resolve to deterministic inverse filter evidence
pendingImprovements.evidence: Production targeted QA asked '현재 정상 범위인 서버 목록 보여줘' and received a monitoring-server-health summary with warning servers rather than a normal-range server list from inverse filter evidence.
pendingImprovements.note: Local follow-up fix has been implemented and passed AI Engine tests, but it is not deployed yet.

notes: Playwright CLI mechanical assertions passed after response extraction was tightened, but semantic QA marked the normal-range prompt as failed because the answer did not list healthy servers and metadata showed monitoring-server-health.
Local follow-up fix changed inverse filter matching for '정상 범위인 서버' and aligned routing signal prefilter extraction with runtime preFilterQuery behavior.
Local validation after the fix: targeted AI Engine tests 48 passed; npm run type-check passed; full AI Engine npm run test passed 139 files / 1435 tests.
This run validates production before the local follow-up fix is deployed; the release decision is conditional/no-go for the healthy-filter target only.
